scope: Pass B full-surface expansion of the legacy X-AppSecretToken/X-AgreementGrantToken REST API at https://restapi.e-conomic.com. Covers the customers/products/suppliers/accounts/invoices/orders master-data and reference-data surface plus the dialect-expressible mutations e-conomic documents for customers/products/suppliers/draft-invoices/invoice-booking. Does not cover the separate, differently-authenticated apis.e-conomic.com OpenAPI product line (customersapi/journalsapi/subscriptionsapi v3+) — a distinct API product with its own base URL/versioning, out of scope for this bundle's spec.json shape.

excluded.reason: single-record GET is redundant with the /customers list stream already read to exhaustion; no legacy or Pass-B caller needs isolated single-customer fetch outside the write actions' own response

a separate, differently-versioned OpenAPI product (apis.e-conomic.com/customersapi, v3.1.0) covering overlapping customer data under a different base URL; this bundle targets the legacy restapi.e-conomic.com surface its spec.json/auth are built for, not the newer product line
